title: A Little SC video
excerpt: Made a little video showcasing some fun techniques for the Studio Calico blog . Digging these little videos and thinking of doing some more. If you've got some ideas of what you would like to see, would love to hear…
body:
Made a little video showcasing some fun techniques for the Studio Calico blog.

Digging these little videos and thinking of doing some more. If you've got some ideas of what you would like to see, would love to hear from you!
